title: CLI Chess
description: Developed a fully functional command-line chess game in C++ that supports all standard rules of chess, including piece movement, check, checkmate, castling, en passant, and pawn promotion.

title: AI Chat APP
description: An AI chat application built with Vite and React on the frontend, and Express.js on the backend. It integrates OpenAI's GPT-3.5 to generate dynamic and context-aware responses.

title: Courses Web Scraper
description: Developed a web scraper using cURL and the Gumbo HTML parser to extract course offerings and available majors from the University of Illinois system website.

title: Enterprise Network Simulation
description: Designed a multi-area OSPF network with VLANs, NAT, DHCP, and inter-VLAN routing in Cisco Packet Tracer, simulating an enterprise-grade network topology.

title: Network Security Lab
description: Configured ACLs, DHCP Snooping, BPDU Guard, and Port Security to simulate enterprise switch hardening and demonstrate common network security controls.

title: SOC Log Analysis Dashboard
description: A full-stack security operations dashboard that parses Apache, SSH, and Windows Event logs to automatically detect brute force attacks, 404 scanning spikes, and off-hours logins. Features interactive visualizations, a searchable log table, and CSV/JSON export.
